ground_truth.title: Standards Overview | Society of Motion Picture & Television Engineers
ground_truth.author: SMPTE
ground_truth.main_content: Since its founding in 1916, SMPTE has developed more than 800 standards, recommended practices, and engineering guidelines, that are currently in force.
with: Since its founding in 1916, SMPTE has developed more than 800 standards, recommended practices, and engineering guidelines, that are currently in force.
SMPTE is the global society of media professionals, technologists and engineers working together to drive the industry forward technical brilliance.
The Board of Directors guides SMPTE's mission and strategy, overseeing operations, financial health, and initiatives in standards, education, and industry advancement.
Get involved in creating next-generation standards by joining a Technology Committee.
The Standards Documents page provides engineering and other documents, including landing pages.

items.caption: Standards Overview - Learn more about SMPTE standards
